items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Ugh... Please tell me this is the last one!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Rover, your moves are sharp as always. Dealing with so many TDs seems like a walk in the park for you.

options.text: Can't call it a day without fighting those monsters.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Rover, did you see that?

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: Now it's almost identical to what we saw three years ago, during the "Battle Beneath the Crescent".

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: I'm afraid... We're already running out of time.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Report the situation, please.

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: Madam Magistrate, the barrier has been fully repaired and we have evacuated all residents. We've successfully minimized the damage.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Well done, Director Taoqi.

options.text: How's it going on your end?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Indeed, it's been a while, Rover.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: It’s been going according to plan, if I may say so. I was made aware of this in advance, and planned out our defense beforehand.

options.text: Was it another hint from Jué?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Now that we are facing such an emergency, I cannot sit back and wait for Jué to save us. I will act and see my duty through. This is my decision.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I have secured some much-needed aid for our city during my visit to the capital. Also, our experts should be ready by now.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Rover, do you still remember Jué's message for you?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Now we have raindrops that fall upstream, and the Midnight Rangers' General in the Norfall Barrens, ready to take on the <ano=Threnodian>Ovathrax</ano>.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: This must be the right time Jué was talking about.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Rover, it's going to be dangerous. You might... directly confront a Threnodian.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You eyes look as determined as ever.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I understand how you must feel, Rover.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I have been in a similar situation before. When my life suddenly took a big turn, and I had no choice but to face it head on.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: On the entire Jinzhou’s behalf, I am immensely grateful for your assistance, Rover.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: You will be remembered as a heroic ally in our defense against external threats, regardless of the outcome of this battle.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: May victory prevail the lasting night. I will pray for your safe return.

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: Rover, I have informed border checkpoints across Jinzhou about your trip to the front line. You have been granted unlimited access to all places.

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: Yangyang, you're one of our Outriders. I hope you can go with Rover and provide assistance.

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: You'll need to pass through a Tacet Field to reach our base in the Desorock Highland. Please be careful.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Rover, Yangyang, I'll be keepin' the city safe as a Patroller. Do come back in one piece, okay?

options.text: You can do it, Ma Xiaofang!
You can do it, Jinzhou Speedster!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Thanks! I'll give it my all!

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Rover! I said don't call me that... Nevermind, we don't have time for this.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Wow, thanks, Rover! Can't believe you still remember that title! I'll live up to it for sure!

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: It seems the rain is not stopping anytime soon...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: The city... What if...

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Rest assured. You can count on me!

items.speaker: Yuanwu
items.text: I will keep everyone safe.

items.speaker: Verina
items.text: Me... Me too!

items.speaker: Lingyang
items.text: Don't forget us Liondance Troupe!

items.speaker: Soldiers
items.text: We've got this!

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: Hehe, as you can see. Everyone's ready to defend our city.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Rover, Yangyang, safe travels!

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: I've informed General Jiyan that you're heading to his place. He will be meeting up with you soon.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: May victory prevail the lasting night!

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: The Threnodian's revival has done significant damage to the environment nearby...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Things have gotten even more dangerous out here. The closer we get to Norfall Barrens, the worse it gets.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: ...Begone!

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: We did it!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Thundering Mephis is a blend of countless fallen soldiers' Reverberations.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: As long as more soldiers are still dying here, it will always return. Not to mention…

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Countless souls of our brave soldiers remain trapped in this rain, to this day.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: ...General.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Sorry. I should've arrived sooner.
Sorry. I should've arrived sooner.

options.text: Honored to meet you, General Jiyan.
I think I've seen you before...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The honor is mine, Rover.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes, allow me to introduce myself. I am Jiyan, the current General of the Midnight Rangers.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Is that so? You're a mysterious individual with vast experience. If we had crossed paths before, I wouldn't be surprised.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Phantoms are mere replicas of the past. Since this is our first time meeting, I wouldn't recognize you if I was one of them. But I do wish we could've met sooner, Rover.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Madam Magistrate and Taoqi have informed me of your willingness to assist us. Thank you for lending us a hand.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I should properly welcome you with Huanglong's formalities, but as the current situation forbids that, I'll brief you on our plans as fast as possible.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I've heard about your deeds from Madam Magistrate. You are a trustworthy ally according to her.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Here. It's the Retroact Rain antidote, developed by the Academy.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: While the antidote cannot shield you from its effects entirely, it should at least lessen the hallucinations.

options.text: What if I was a "Phantom", then?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: For someone to show up as a "Phantom" in the Retroact Rain, two conditions must be met:

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Prior exposure to the rain, and a deep connection to the affected area.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: You were found in the Gorges of Spirits only recently, and this is your first time setting foot in Jinzhou, ruling out that possibility.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Moreover... you possess a similar ability with the legendary hero who once absorbed a Threnodian. Jué prophesied about your arrival.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I was told you'd come to the Norfall Barrens one day... To reclaim your lost power from Ovathrax.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I'll do everything in my power to help you make that happen.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes. Madam Magistrate might not be aware of this, as it happened before she was appointed.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: On the day I was selected to be the next General, Jué told me this...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: "Beneath the full moon, guide the returning one to confront Threnodian. From the threat itself, {Male=he;Female=she} shall reclaim the power to conquer it."

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: And if you are indeed the "returning one" mentioned here, we may actually get rid of that monster once and for all.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: You might have noticed something off about that moon. We call it the "Void Plenilune".

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Once it fully takes shape... Ovathrax, the Threnodian of War, would be reawakening soon.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It is an ancient terror that reigns over our land, capable of devouring weapon frequencies to enhance itself.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Norfall Barrens have become a massive graveyard of weapons after countless battles. Those weapons would've made it even stronger than before.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: But we must act now. The Void Plenilune is already visible, we must contain the Threnodian swiftly. Any delay could allow it to recover and become harder to deal with.

options.text: Understood. What are we doing next?
Any suggestions for music at my funeral?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: To remain calm in such an extreme situation, your composure is admirable indeed.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Hold on! We cannot afford to rush the plan.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Fret not. Our enemy is strong, but not unbeatable. I am positive we will prevail.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: We'll get into the specifics once we reach our base.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: It's him, General Jiyan!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Well done.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: ...The rain has stopped.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: General, the Retroact Rain's effects are subsiding. We are observing a sharp decline in the number of Tacet Discords in the Norfall Barrens.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: The Disruptor is fully charged and ready to fire. But...

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: It takes a lot of energy to fire the Disruptor. If we missed...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: ...This is our only chance.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Greetings. Can you hear me?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: As the Magistrate of Jinzhou, I have obtained the approval to use the Disruptor in combat.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: The enormous energy consumption, the risk of a misfire, and the weight of this decision... I will bear the responsibility.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: I alone will be accountable for the outcome of this battle, whatever it may be.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: General, Rover, please march on.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: May victory prevail the lasting night. I pray for your safe return.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: ...Thank you for your trust, Madam Magistrate.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: No need for that, General. We've always shared the same goal, you and I.

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: Attention, all units. Do everything you can to assist. You are authorized to use the Disruptor!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Target, the Norfall Barrens.

items.speaker: Jiyan & Jinhsi
items.text: Defend Jinzhou at all costs!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: This rain... It's finally happening.

items.speaker: Midnight Ranger
items.text: General.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Yes. How's it going?

items.speaker: Midnight Ranger
items.text: We have five hundred remaining soldiers prepared and medically cleared for combat. After receiving the antidote for Retroact Rain, they have reported minimal hallucinations and no adverse effects.

items.speaker: Midnight Ranger
items.text: However, a few veterans still reported sporadic sightings of Phantoms in the rain...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I see. Stay alert, we will continue as planned. Report any signs of potential TD Outbreaks immediately.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: We march on to the Norfall Barrens as soon as the rain stops.

items.speaker: Midnight Ranger
items.text: Aye, sir!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Defend the south gate! Enemy attack weakening. This wave is almost over!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Is that...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Thundering Mephis?

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: General!

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: We've got all equipment repaired, Tacetite weapons adjusted and given to Resonators. Non-Resonators are also equipped and prepared for action.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: But... the rain's getting heavier. Should we take shelter for the time being?

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: One of our combat medics claims it's no ordinary downpour, and he strongly advises holding off any moves until it clears.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: Though young, his sharp intuition has been proven in previous battles. You've seen it firsthand.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: However... I do agree this will be our last chance at organizing another attack.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: Sir, his name is...

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: Ji...yan...

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: General, help... Please... help me...
What do you make of this, Jiyan?
Maybe you are right.
The rain just happened out of nowhere. It's indeed unusual. But...
This is our only chance.
The enemy we've been yearning to destroy is finally right before us.
And now you're asking me to sit back and do nothing because of some Phantoms?
Silence... Is this your response? Or is it fear holding your tongue?
Ah... I see. You’re no different. We fear, we bleed, we suffer, and in the end, we'll all die on the battlefield.
But what about your brethren, friends and comrades? As you witness them viciously slain before your eyes, one by one...
Will you still remain silent when their souls demand an answer?
There is no other choice. We must trample the pile of corpses at our feet and push on. Keep barking orders, keep fighting until every last one of those monsters is gone.
The Retroact Rain merely creates illusions of past events. My soldiers will not succumb to those hallucinations. I will not allow it.
We'll crush anything in our path, no questions asked.
And I will pave the way for us all with my Forte.
If tens, hundreds, thousands more of my men will die… So be it. We will win this battle, by any means necessary.
Jiyan, I have a question for you... What would you have done on that day, if you were in my position?
Whatever you say... I'll never answer those brave souls with such silence and cowardice.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: General Geshu Lin... We fight to protect what we cherish.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: And we cherish our comrades, not out of cowardice or fear, but out of trust. The trust in their lives' worth.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I cannot assure you I am always making the right choice, General.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: But we should never build our victory on top of endless sacrifices.

items.speaker: Geshu Lin
items.text: Hah, is that so?

items.speaker: Geshu Lin
items.text: As I see it, we are cut from the same cloth, you and I.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Perhaps we are indeed, General. I share at least one thing with you. I, too, will draw my blade to fight for what I believe in... and I'll stop at nothing to see it through.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: General!

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: General... You look pale.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I am fine. Please go on.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: We just detected an intense frequency reaction from that Tacet Field ahead.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: That moon... It's gradually turning full now, as you predicted.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: The sky... It looks just like how it was during the Battle Beneath the Crescent...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It's time.

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: Sir, the Midnight Rangers are ready. We await your orders.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Attention all troops! Take position and get ready to engage!

items.speaker: Soldier
items.text: Yes, sir!

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: "When the moon turns full, a roving traveler shall return"... The prophecy is being fulfilled.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Here they are.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: They're not coming at us... Are they trying to protect something... Or are they waiting for commands?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: With an TD Outbreak of this magnitude and organization, someone must be orchestrating it. Could it be...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: It looks almost full now.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: And the Retroact Rain falling... Rover, maybe this is "the right time" Madam Magistrate was talking about?

items.speaker: Jinhsi
items.text: ...Citizens of Jinzhou, please remain calm and evacuate in an orderly manner as we practiced during previous drills...

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: It's a pre-recorded broadcast message. Our Magistrate saw this coming, and she had General Jiyan devise an emergency plan a long time ago.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: This wave of TD attacks should be over now.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: We knew this was coming and we were ready, but oh boy, the amount of TDs is insane.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Thanks for coming in time, Rover. It would've taken us much longer to handle this.

items.speaker: Chixia
items.text: Oh, Director Taoqi is here too. For a better run down of the situation, you can find her near the city gate!

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: Are you... Yangyang? Oh, thank goodness...

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: ...What happened here?

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: The Thundering Mephis... it came back...

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: I'm part of the Desorock Highland supply transport team...

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: This is where our supply station is... We work to keep our soldiers alive.

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: We were on our way, had to go through this Tacet Field...

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: Thundering Mephis… The rain brought it back to life, crushing our transport…

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: In the end, I barely escaped... I can't move anymore...

items.speaker: Dying Midnight Ranger
items.text: This place... Dangerous... Careful... Please...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Watch out!

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: General!

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: Greetings, General.

items.speaker: Yangyang
items.text: Master Jianxin? Didn't know I'd be seeing you here...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Jianxin recently arrived at our base with one of the supply delivery teams. She has been a great help.

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: General, you flatter me.

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: I've heard people comparing the Norfall Barrens to a massive graveyard. Whenever it rains, cries and moans can be heard, as if many ghosts are weeping...

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: Master once told me life and death should follow a natural course. The heavens and the earth form a vast chamber, where spirits freely depart and return.

items.speaker: Jianxin
items.text: Countless brave souls have been trapped here by the evil powers of Ovathrax. I want to help set them free.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Please follow me.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Our main goal is to contain the reviving Threnodian, but we must beware of the Tacet Discords too. They have shown unpredictability in every past battle.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Academy determined they were not native to the Norfall Barrens, and instead had been conjured by a mysterious power.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: After analyzing their behavior, I believe the source of said power is none other than that statue.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: While the Ovathrax is still weakened, we must seize the opportunity to act.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: With looming danger from the continued onsets of TD Outbreaks, and many of our units injured and unable to fight, it is crucial to plan our attack wisely.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Please, join me in mapping out the strategic plans.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Good. Are we all clear on what to do?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Our next move is to reclaim the Disruptor and break through the Groundwave Barrier.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Rover, do you see that iridescent veil?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: That's the Groundwave Barrier. Ovathrax set it up to absorb weapon frequencies in the Norfall Barrens without interruption.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: One of our top priorities now is to protect the Disruptor from Tacet Discord attacks.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: It's a powerful anti-Threnodian weapon from when Jinzhou was founded. We need it to break through this barrier.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I'll leave it to the professional to explain the details.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Greetings, General Jiyan, Rover.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: How's the preparation going on your side?

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: We've got good news and bad news. Good news is, we've established connection to the Disruptor and we're ready to go.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Bad news is, the Disruptor’s electric capacitor is damaged.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Simply put, it’s out of power.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Fortunately, there should be a backup power outlet.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: To use the Disruptor, we'll have to repair that outlet first, then wait for a full charge.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Any questions?

options.text: Can we blow up the Threnodian with this?
Why is it still powered by pre-Lament energy?
Can you make some more Disruptors?

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: In theory, we could. In practice, it's difficult.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: First, it could dodge our attack. Not even a perfect hit can kill it. It will be gravely injured, but not dead.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Threnodians have been proven to be way stronger than we imagined. Our Disruptor can't handle the Ovathrax, but it can certainly break through that Barrier.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: That's because this ancient Disruptor dates back at least to the founding of Jinzhou.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Creating such a powerful weapon with limited technology back then… whoever did it was truly a genius, I must say.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: If we were to unleash its full power on Jinzhou city, it might launch the entire place into the air.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: ...I can, but it takes time.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: No matter how fast I build it... Jinzhou won't be able to hold out that long.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: By the way, this is a weapon of mass destruction... The Capital would want strict control over its use, I assume?

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Will they really approve our application?

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The Magistrate and I have it covered. Trust me.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Alright, we’ll be waiting for the green light.

items.speaker: Mortefi
items.text: Lastly, we've got more bad news... Baizhi, please fill us in.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: Yes.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: Rover, I am currently monitoring the Tacet Discord attacks from the Academy to design a safer route for you.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: We just received word from our soldiers at the emplacement. A large number of Tacet Discords are targeting the Disruptor, and our troops are doing their best to defend it.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: The Disruptor has been surrounded by the Tacet Discords, with more of them slowly closing in.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: After we recapture the nearby emplacement, it will take some more time for the Disruptor to recharge. You may need to hold out a little longer.

items.speaker: Baizhi
items.text: I'll send you the coordinates of the Disruptor and its backup energy port. We wish you the best of luck.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I trust we all understand the situation now.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Rover, Yangyang, please go secure the Disruptor and fix its backup energy outlet.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Jianxin, please stay and guard the base. I’ll draw those Tacet Discords away.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Let's get moving.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: Please update me on the situation in Jinzhou city.

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: Under Madam Magistrate's command, the barrier has been activated and citizens are being evacuated to the safe zone.

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: Huaxu Academy and Ministry of Development are on standby for further instructions. Bazhi is overseeing operations at the Academy while Mortefi has arrived at the Ministry. Rest assured, we are all safe in the city.

items.speaker: Taoqi
items.text: And that Rover... {Male=He;Female=She} is heading over to meet you. Yangyang is coming with {Male=him;Female=her}.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I see. We have successfully contained the Outbreak here at the base.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I will go pick them up as soon as possible.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: The rain's getting heavier...

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: There are signs of Tacet Discords reviving. Intense frequency fluctuations detected… they’ll be passing through that area. I must create a safe passage for them.

items.speaker: Jiyan
items.text: I need to clear the way for them as quickly as possible.
